trivia_bullets.text: Volcanic Geyser is a Mirage original, first printed October 1996 — placing it among Magic's oldest X-damage burn spells. It has been reprinted across nine sets: Classic Sixth Edition (1999), Friday Night Magic promo (2000), Magic 2013, Magic 2014, Archenemy: Nicol Bolas (2017), MTGO Promos (2014), Core Set 2021, and The List (2024). The M21 printing is the card's first Arena-legal version, making it newly accessible to digital players 24 years after its debut. [Scryfall prints search]

EDHREC rank: 12,566. As an {X}{R}{R} instant that deals X damage to any target, Volcanic Geyser is a scalable burn spell and mana-sink in Commander but faces stiff competition from Banefire (uncounterable), Comet Storm (multi-target), and Fall of the Titans. Scryfall flags it as a combo piece with Caldera Breaker (Alchemy: Ixalan, December 2023) — Caldera Breaker conjures Volcanic Geysers directly from outside the game into the library as a digital-Arena mechanic. [EDHREC; Scryfall related_cards / combo_piece tag; Scryfall: Caldera Breaker]

Flavor text: "The common folk call it the breaking of the crust or the spilling of fire. Geomancers call it target practice." — Ryda, geomancer. Ryda does not appear in any other published MTG lore; the quote frames geomancy as a discipline that domesticates volcanic catastrophe into craft — consistent with the geomancer archetype seen in Koth of the Hammer and other red-mage lore. [Scryfall]

Artist Clint Cearley has produced a substantial Magic catalog including notable land and environment illustrations. His Swamp from Hour of Devastation was cited in a Hipsters of the Coast analysis comparing MTG art to Mark Rothko's abstract expressionist work, noting Cearley's skill with atmospheric vertical compositions — visible in the Volcanic Geyser art's dominant vertical eruption column. [Hipsters of the Coast: 'Mark Rothko and Magic: the Gathering,' August 2021; Scryfall artist field]

related_cards.name: Banefire
related_cards.note: Uncounterable X-damage burn spell; frequently cited as Volcanic Geyser's superior for Commander finisher roles

related_cards.name: Comet Storm
related_cards.note: Multi-target X-burn instant; competes in the same X-spell Commander mana-sink space

related_cards.name: Caldera Breaker
related_cards.note: Scryfall-listed combo piece — conjures Volcanic Geysers into the library as an Arena digital mechanic

related_cards.name: Fireball
related_cards.note: The original scalable X-burn spell; Volcanic Geyser is the instant-speed narrow-target successor

related_cards.name: Fall of the Titans
related_cards.note: Instant-speed X-burn with surge; direct design comparison for the scalable-burn slot
